articles.title: Microsoft places ‘assessment in investing in bitcoin’ as a voting item for December shareholder meeting
articles.description: Microsoft will consider investing in bitcoin at its next shareholder meeting, according to an SEC filing on Thursday.

articles.title: Cardano Opens $1.3T Bitcoin Liquidity with BitcoinOS
articles.description: Cardano employs BitcoinOS to incorporate Bitcoin liquidity into its DeFi ecosystem, utilizing zero-knowledge cryptography to ensure cross-chain functionality. New integration with BitcoinOS (BOS) , an innovative contract platform, is expected to give Cardano access to $1.3 trillion in Bitcoin liquidity for its decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem. articles.title: Solana Just Reached New ATH Against Ethereum: Details
articles.description: Solana on tear in its ETH pairing

articles.title: The real flippening? Solana price hits new record high against Ethereum
articles.description: Solana has surged by approximately 600% against Ethereum since 2023 thanks to the memecoin mania.

articles.title: Ethereum Whale Continues Dump as ETH/BTC Hits 3Yr Low
articles.description: As the Ethereum whale from the ICO era offloads an additional 3000 ETH today, the ETH/BTC trading pair reaches its lowest levels since 2021. The Ethereum (ETH) price has remained in a sideways trend, hovering around $2,550, despite most altcoins attempting to surge upward.The ETH/BTC pair has also declined, reaching its lowest since 2021. articles.title: Cardano unlocks $1.3T Bitcoin liquidity with BitcoinOS bridge integration
articles.description: Cardano taps BitcoinOS to integrate Bitcoin liquidity into its DeFi ecosystem using zero-knowledge cryptography for secure cross-chain functionality.

articles.title: Tesla Keeps Bitcoin Holdings Steady Despite Market Speculation
articles.description: Tesla's Q3 report confirms it still holds 11,509 Bitcoin, easing concerns after wallet moves and showing optimism for the cryptocurrency's future.
